solutions.title: Solution (Neon)

()
=
repeat
(

()!!.
toInt
())

val
(

,
m

=

()!!.
split
(
" "

map
{
it

toInt
()
}

(
n
)
{
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
}

=
BooleanArray
(

)
{
false

val ord

<

>()

(

,

,

-

(

:

,

{
ord
.
add
(
a
[
x
][
y
])
used
[
a
[
x
][
y
]]
=
true
for
(

in
0
until
4
)
{

=
x
+

[
i
]
val ny
=
y
+
dy
[
i
]
if
(
0

nx

<

&&
0

ny
&&

a
[

]
!=

!

[

[

(

,

)
ord
.
add
(

[

][

}
}
}
var
k
=
0
for
(
x
in
0
until
n
)

for
(
y
in
0
until
m
)

if
(
a
[

0

k
+=
1
if
(
ord
.
isEmpty
())
dfs
(

,

)
}

if
(
ord
.
count
()
!=
2
*

-
1
)

@repeat

(-
1
)

(

)

x
in
0
until
k
)

(

in
0
until
k
)

(

)
